name: Upcoming Departures
query:
SELECT
    tb.name AS "Booking ID:Link/Travel Booking",
    tb.customer AS "Customer:Link/Customer",
    tb.travel_start_date AS "Travel Date:Date",
    tb.status AS "Payment Status:Data",
    tb.has_issues AS "Open Issues:Check"
FROM `tabTravel Booking` tb
WHERE tb.travel_start_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
ORDER BY tb.travel_start_date ASC;
